title: Поширені запитання
summary: Короткі відповіді на типові питання щодо налаштування Action 6.
faq: No. Use it for crop or oversampled detail. 4K is easier to edit and supports a broader workflow.
Should I always use D-Log M?
No. Use Normal for direct delivery; D-Log M when you will grade.
Only for a deliberately fixed slow shutter. They can hurt rough-action EIS by forcing motion blur or higher ISO.
RockSteady for general use, Plus for severe shake, HorizonBalancing for moderate roll, HorizonSteady for full horizon lock.
Can I dive without a case?
DJI rates the camera to 20 m with doors and lens cover secured; it recommends the case for long sessions or high water-impact pressure.
Why is footage blurry at night?
The camera must trade shutter, ISO and processing. Add light, lower fps, move smoothly or use SuperNight.
